heading_content_part: Privacy policyPrivacy policyThis Privacy Policy defines how Ayiip Studio collects and uses users personal and non-personal information and data in our mobile applications (available for smart phones and tablets) and on our website.

decoder_heading: Ayiip Studio respects your privacy rights and recognizes the importance of protecting any information collected about you.
ident_heading: Ayiip Studio respects your privacy rights and recognizes the importance of protecting any information collected about you.
heading_content_part: Ayiip Studio respects your privacy rights and recognizes the importance of protecting any information collected about you.

decoder_heading: Ayiip Studio do not collect any personal user data.
ident_heading: Ayiip Studio do not collect any personal user data.
heading_content_part: Ayiip Studio do not collect any personal user data.

decoder_heading: Ayiip Studio may use tools or third-party analytics software to collect and use certain non-personal data that does not enable us to identify you (we track only data such as: device type, mobile device software, data carrier,...).
ident_heading: Ayiip Studio may use tools or third-party analytics software to collect and use certain non-personal data that does not enable us to identify you (we track only data such as: device type, mobile device software, data carrier, ...)
heading_content_part: Ayiip Studio may use tools or third-party analytics software to collect and use certain non-personal data that does not enable us to identify you (we track only data such as: device type, mobile device software, data carrier, ...).

decoder_heading: Ayiip Studio uses Google Analytics to analyze anonymous aggregated usage data for our applications.
ident_heading: Ayiip Studio uses Google Analytics to analyze anonymous aggregated usage data for our applications.
heading_content_part: Ayiip Studio uses Google Analytics to analyze anonymous aggregated usage data for our applications.

decoder_heading: Advertisers who serve ads may use technology which can uniquely identify mobile devices to deliver better target messages and control number of times you get an Add.
ident_heading: Advertisers who serve ads may use technology which can uniquely identify mobile devices to deliver better target messages and control number of times you get an Add.
heading_content_part: Advertisers who serve ads may use technology which can uniquely identify mobile devices to deliver better target messages and control number of times you get an Add.

decoder_heading: Add Networks may access your unique device identifier through their own technologies and use it to target advertising to you.
ident_heading: Add Networks may access your unique device identifier through their own technologies and use it to target advertising to you.
heading_content_part: Add Networks may access your unique device identifier through their own technologies and use it to target advertising to you.

decoder_heading: Advertisers make available links through advertisements or otherwise enabling you to access third party sites, tools or games.
ident_heading: Advertisers make available links through advertisements or otherwise enabling you to access third party sites, tools or games.
heading_content_part: Advertisers make available links through advertisements or otherwise enabling you to access third party sites, tools or games.

decoder_heading: Please note that, while using such sites, tools or games, you are not affiliated with or controlled by us.
ident_heading: Please note that, while using such sites, tools or games, you are not affiliated with or controlled by us.
heading_content_part: Please note that, while using such sites, tools or games, you are not affiliated with or controlled by us.

decoder_heading: Ayiip Studio applications use Google AdMob ads as primary ad service and Facebook Audience Network, StartApp.

heading_content_part: Ayiip Studio applications use Google AdMob ads as primary ad service and Facebook Audience Network, StartApp.
